title: Climate System Modeling & Long-Term Dynamics

tipping_points.object: Climate tipping points (AMOC, ice sheets, Amazon)

amoc_collapse.shadow_why: Bifurcation: dψ/dF = 0 at tipping point; ψ(F) = EML-2 near bifurcation

tipping_cascade.prediction: Same shadow type (both EML-2): max(∞,∞)=∞; but shadow of combined=2
tipping_cascade.result: Tipping cascade: shadow=EML-2 (both measurement-type tipping points)

milankovitch.formula: F(t) = Σₙ Aₙ exp(i·ωₙ·t): multi-frequency forcing
milankovitch.why: exp(i·ωₙ·t): complex oscillation over orbital frequencies = EML-3

forcing_tensor_climate.biological: This is why paleoclimate is harder than weather: cross-type coupling

100kyr_cycle.note: 100kyr ice age cycle: orbital forcing (EML-3) + nonlinear climate (EML-2) = EML-∞ synchronization

enso.formula: dT/dt = -εT + μh: coupled with thermocline depth h

depth_ladder.EML_2: Carbon cycle, energy balance, ice sheets (real exp, measurement)
depth_ladder.EML_3: Orbital forcing (complex oscillation), ENSO, monsoon oscillations
depth_ladder.EML_inf: Tipping point transitions (TYPE 2), coupled cross-type (EML-2 × EML-3)

cross_type_products.orbital_EML3_x_climate_EML2: = EML-∞: explains unpredictability of ice ages

key_theorem: Climate Semiring Theorem (S281): Earth system couples EML-2 (carbon cycle, energy balance) and EML-3 (orbital forcing, ENSO). Carbon cycle: 2⊗2⊗2=2 (closed EML-2 subring). Orbital forcing × climate: EML-3 ⊗ EML-2 = EML-∞. THIS EXPLAINS: why ice ages are unpredictable from climate alone — coupling orbital (EML-3 oscillatory) with climate (EML-2 measurement) = EML-∞. Tipping points are TYPE 2 Horizons with EML-2 shadow (measurement approach). ENSO × AMOC = EML-∞: cross-type explains abrupt Holocene climate transitions. The Earth system depth ladder: EML-0 (orbits) → EML-2 (climate) → EML-3 (oscillations) → EML-∞ (coupled).
rabbit_hole_log: Orbital forcing (EML-3) × climate (EML-2) = EML-∞: cross-type explains ice age unpredictability
Tipping points: TYPE 2 Horizons, shadow=EML-2 (bifurcation analysis = real-valued)
ENSO (EML-3) × AMOC (EML-2) = EML-∞: abrupt transitions explained by cross-type
Earth system ladder: EML-0 orbits, EML-2 energy balance, EML-3 oscillations, EML-∞ coupling
